title: Build course lessons and real-world class content

acceptance_criteria.text: Define a course content model that treats questions as assessment, not the primary lesson experience.
Draft the complete A+ course architecture with domains, units, class-style lessons, real-world scenarios, checks for understanding, labs, review paths, and PBQ tie-ins.
Document authoring standards for original lesson content, field relevance, accessibility, objective mapping, and cert-id/id-prefix requirements.
Identify required app changes for browsing lessons, tracking lesson completion, and connecting lessons to practice questions, labs, flashcards, and mock readiness.
